about.title: About Me
about.content: Master's student at Beihang University, focused on hardware design and embedded system development. Multiple national first-prize competition awards. Specialized in high-speed PCB design, FPGA development, and analog circuit design. Passionate about fitness — a healthy body fuels productive work.

items.title: High-Speed Data Acquisition System
items.desc: FPGA-based multi-channel high-speed data acquisition and processing system, supporting 1GSPS sampling rate

items.title: Smart Power Management Module
items.desc: High-efficiency DC-DC converter design with multi-output and intelligent power management

items.title: Embedded Vision Recognition Platform
items.desc: ARM+FPGA based real-time vision recognition system for industrial inspection
